meaning: n.隐藏处所,隐藏的粮食或物资,贮藏物;vt.隐藏,窖藏;n.高速缓冲存储器
examples: In your Web browser's cache are the most recent Web files that you have downloaded.
You may need to clear your DNS cache.
A cache is just something stored or hidden away.
Flash memory as a cache for HDD arrays is a popular application in enterprise environments.
Likewise, if DRAM ever loses out to magnetic memory, cache chips will decline alongside it.
